description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the node:latest Docker image globally and caching the node_modules directory. Define a build-project job that runs in the default stage, overrides the image to node:8, and executes the shell commands: useradd -m -p 123 builder; apt-get update; apt-get -yq install chromium; apt-get -yq install git; npm install -g bower grunt-cli; npm install; bower install --allow-root; chmod 777 -fR .; su builder -c "grunt test"; find . -name lcov.info | xargs -d '\n' cat | node_modules/.bin/codacy-coverage -t $CODACY_PROJECT_TOKEN; su builder -c "grunt release". The job stores coverage/, doc/, and dist/ as artifacts expiring in 1 day and captures test coverage with the regex /Lines\s*:\s*(\d+\.\d+)%/. Add a pages job in the deploy stage that depends on build-project, runs only on the master branch, runs ls -l, mkdir .public, moves coverage/ to .public/coverage/, moves doc/ to .public/doc/, renames .public to public, and publishes the public/ directory as a GitLab Pages artifact expiring in 90 days.
